case_title: BLACK, ROBERT vs. VALPERGA, MARIO JOHN

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLACK, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT VALPERGA, MARIO JOHN SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-20-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-19-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-31-1994
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-20-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, FOR ANSWER OF DISMISSAL. PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANT. HEARING SET FOR AUG-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
